_meta.description: CDL Legal court routing rulebook. Maps state/county/city to court info and online scheduling URLs.
cdl_major_violations: Using Vehicle in Commission of a Felony

AL.name: Alabama
AL.notes: Minor violations may be paid at county courthouse or online. CDL holders must notify employer within 30 days of conviction.

Jefferson.notes: I-20 and I-65 corridor. High CDL volume.

Mobile.notes: I-10 and I-65 corridor. Major port/freight hub.

AK.name: Alaska
AK.notes: Many Alaska courts require in-person appearance. Contact the specific district court in the citation.

Anchorage.notes: Primary CDL hub in Alaska. Most commercial traffic originates here.

Fairbanks North Star.notes: Dalton Highway and Alaska Railroad freight corridor.

AZ.name: Arizona
AZ.notes: Most Arizona courts offer online payment through their individual court websites. Justice courts handle minor traffic violations; Superior Court handles more serious offenses.

Maricopa.court_name: Maricopa County Justice Courts / Superior Court
Maricopa.notes: CDL violations typically handled in Justice Court of the precinct where ticket was issued.

AR.name: Arkansas
AR.notes: District Courts handle minor traffic violations. Circuit Courts handle serious offenses.

Pulaski.address: 400 W Markham St, Little Rock, AR 72201
Pulaski.notes: I-40 and I-30 interchange. Major CDL corridor.

Washington.notes: I-49 corridor. NW Arkansas freight hub.

CA.name: California
CA.notes: California requires mandatory court appearance for most CDL traffic violations. Pay or schedule at the county Superior Court where ticket was issued.

Los Angeles.court_name: Los Angeles Superior Court — Traffic Division
Los Angeles.address: 1945 S Hill St, Los Angeles, CA 90007
Los Angeles.notes: Use the county portal to find the specific courthouse. CA CDL holders forfeit right to traffic school.

San Bernardino.address: 247 W Third St, San Bernardino, CA 92415

Kern.notes: Major I-5 and Hwy 99 corridor court.

CO.name: Colorado
CO.notes: Colorado County Courts handle traffic violations. Serious CDL violations require in-person appearance.

CT.name: Connecticut
CT.notes: Online ticket payment available at jud.ct.gov/payticket. CDL holders must appear for all moving violations.

Hartford.notes: I-84 and I-91 interchange. Primary CDL corridor.

New Haven.court_name: New Haven Geographical Area Court — Traffic

Fairfield.notes: I-95 corridor (NY border). High CDL volume.

DE.name: Delaware
DE.notes: Justice of the Peace Courts handle minor traffic. Court of Common Pleas handles more serious violations.

New Castle.court_name: New Castle County Justice of the Peace Courts
New Castle.notes: I-95 and I-295 corridor. DE Memorial Bridge approach. High CDL volume.

Kent.court_name: Kent County Justice of the Peace Court

FL.name: Florida
FL.notes: Pay through the Clerk of Court in the county where the ticket was issued. CDL holders cannot elect traffic school.

Hillsborough.court_name: Hillsborough County Clerk of Circuit Court — Traffic

Orange.court_name: Orange County Clerk of Courts — Traffic

Duval.court_name: Duval County Clerk of Courts — Traffic

Broward.court_name: Broward County Clerk of Courts — Traffic

Polk.court_name: Polk County Clerk of Courts — Traffic
Polk.notes: I-4 corridor. High CDL traffic volume.

GA.name: Georgia
GA.notes: Magistrate Courts and State Courts handle traffic citations. Superior Court for serious offenses. CDL holders must appear for serious violations.

HI.name: Hawaii
HI.notes: Traffic Violations Bureau handles minor violations. District Court handles more serious offenses.

Honolulu.court_name: Honolulu District Court — Traffic Violations Bureau
Honolulu.notes: Primary CDL court for Hawaii. All inter-island freight originates on Oahu.

ID.name: Idaho
ID.notes: Magistrate Courts handle most traffic violations. Pay online through iCourt.

Ada.notes: I-84 and I-184 corridor. Major Idaho CDL hub.

Kootenai.address: 501 N Government Way, Coeur d'Alene, ID 83814

IL.name: Illinois
IL.notes: Circuit Courts handle traffic violations at the county level. Cook County has its own system. CDL holders must appear for moving violations in many counties.

Cook.court_name: Cook County Circuit Court — Traffic Division
Cook.notes: Major suburban traffic court. Chicago tickets go to 321 N LaSalle, Chicago IL 60654.

Will.notes: Major I-80 and I-55 corridor court.

IN.name: Indiana
IN.notes: Indiana Superior Courts and County Courts handle traffic violations. Pay online at mycase.in.gov.

Lake.address: 2293 N Main St, Crown Point, IN 46307

St. Joseph.court_name: St. Joseph County Superior Court — Traffic
St. Joseph.address: 101 S Main St, South Bend, IN 46601

Allen.address: 715 S Calhoun St, Fort Wayne, IN 46802

IA.name: Iowa
IA.notes: Iowa District Courts handle all traffic violations. Online payment through Iowa Courts eServices. Major I-80 corridor state.

Pottawattamie.notes: I-80 / I-29 interchange. Major CDL corridor.

KS.name: Kansas
KS.notes: Municipal Courts handle minor violations. District Courts for serious offenses. I-70 and I-35 major CDL corridors.

KY.name: Kentucky
KY.notes: District Courts handle traffic violations. Pay online at kcoj.kycourts.net. I-75, I-65, and I-64 major CDL corridors.

Jefferson.notes: I-64, I-65, and I-71 interchange. Major CDL hub.

Boone.notes: I-75 corridor (Ohio border). CVR inspection station nearby.

LA.name: Louisiana
LA.notes: City Courts and Parish Courts handle traffic violations. I-10, I-20, and I-49 major CDL corridors.

Orleans.court_name: Orleans Parish Criminal District Court — Traffic

East Baton Rouge.court_name: East Baton Rouge Parish Court — Traffic
East Baton Rouge.address: 222 Saint Louis St, Baton Rouge, LA 70802

Jefferson.notes: I-10 west of New Orleans. High CDL volume.

Cumberland.notes: I-95 corridor. Primary Maine CDL court.

MD.name: Maryland
MD.notes: District Courts of Maryland handle traffic violations. CDL holders waive right to traffic school. Pay online at mdcourts.gov.

Baltimore City.notes: I-95 and I-83 corridor. Port of Baltimore freight hub.

Prince George's.court_name: Prince George's County District Court — Traffic

Frederick.notes: I-70 and I-270 corridor. Heavy CDL traffic westbound.

MA.name: Massachusetts
MA.notes: District Courts handle traffic matters. RMV handles license impacts.

Worcester.notes: I-90 and I-290 corridor. Central MA freight hub.

MI.name: Michigan
MI.notes: District Courts handle traffic violations. I-75, I-94, I-96 major CDL corridors.

Macomb.address: 40 N Main St, Mount Clemens, MI 48043

MN.name: Minnesota
MN.notes: All minor traffic fines payable online at mncourts.gov/fines. Serious violations require in-person appearance at the district court in the county where ticket was issued. Minnesota has 10 judicial districts.

Hennepin.court_name: Hennepin County District Court — 4th Judicial District
Hennepin.notes: Online payment at mncourts.gov/fines for minor violations.

Ramsey.court_name: Ramsey County District Court — 2nd Judicial District
Ramsey.address: 15 W Kellogg Blvd, St. Paul, MN 55102
Ramsey.notes: Online payment at mncourts.gov/fines for minor violations.

Anoka.court_name: Anoka County District Court — 10th Judicial District
Anoka.notes: I-35W corridor. Online payment at mncourts.gov/fines.

Dakota.court_name: Dakota County District Court — 1st Judicial District

Washington.court_name: Washington County District Court — 10th Judicial District

Scott.court_name: Scott County District Court — 1st Judicial District

St. Louis.court_name: St. Louis County District Court — 6th Judicial District

Olmsted.court_name: Olmsted County District Court — 3rd Judicial District

Stearns.court_name: Stearns County District Court — 7th Judicial District

MS.name: Mississippi
MS.notes: Justice Courts and Municipal Courts handle traffic violations. I-20 and I-55 major CDL corridors.

Hinds.notes: I-20 and I-55 interchange. Major CDL hub.

Harrison.notes: I-10 corridor. Port of Gulfport freight hub.

DeSoto.notes: I-55 Memphis corridor. Extremely high CDL volume.

MO.name: Missouri
MO.notes: Municipal Courts handle minor violations. Circuit Courts for serious offenses. Pay at casenet.mo.gov. I-70 and I-44 major CDL corridors.

St. Louis City.court_name: St. Louis City Circuit Court — Traffic
St. Louis City.address: 10 N Tucker Blvd, St. Louis, MO 63101

MT.name: Montana
MT.notes: Justice Courts handle minor traffic violations. District Courts for serious offenses. I-90 and I-15 major CDL corridors.

Yellowstone.notes: I-90 and I-94 interchange. Montana's primary CDL corridor.

NE.name: Nebraska
NE.notes: County Courts handle traffic violations. I-80 is the primary CDL corridor across the state.

NV.name: Nevada
NV.notes: Justice Courts handle minor traffic violations. District Courts for serious offenses.

Clark.court_name: Las Vegas Justice Court / Clark County District Court

Hillsborough.notes: I-93 corridor. Largest NH CDL volume.

NJ.name: New Jersey
NJ.notes: Municipal Courts handle all traffic violations. CDL holders must appear for moving violations. Pay or schedule at njcourts.gov.

Essex.notes: I-78 and NJ Turnpike. Port Newark freight hub.

Bergen.notes: I-95 corridor (NY border). George Washington Bridge approaches.

Middlesex.notes: I-95 and I-287 interchange. NJ Turnpike corridor.

Burlington.notes: NJ Turnpike (I-295 corridor). High CDL volume.

NM.name: New Mexico
NM.notes: Magistrate Courts handle minor traffic violations. District Courts for serious offenses. I-10, I-25, and I-40 major CDL corridors.

Bernalillo.notes: I-25 and I-40 interchange. Major NM CDL hub.

Do\u00f1a Ana.court_name: Doña Ana County Magistrate Court — Traffic
Do\u00f1a Ana.address: 201 W Picacho Ave, Las Cruces, NM 88005
Do\u00f1a Ana.notes: I-10 and I-25 corridor. Near Mexico border.

San Juan.notes: US-550 corridor. Heavy oil/gas industry CDL traffic.

NY.name: New York
NY.court_system: New York State Unified Court System
NY.notes: Traffic Violations Bureau (TVB) handles NYC area tickets electronically. Upstate: Town/Village Justice Courts. CDL holders cannot be offered plea bargain in NY. NY CDL violations trigger FMCSA reporting.

NC.name: North Carolina
NC.notes: District Courts handle traffic violations. Online payment available at nccourts.gov. I-85, I-95, and I-77 major CDL corridors.

ND.name: North Dakota
ND.notes: County Courts handle traffic violations. I-94 and I-29 major CDL corridors.

Cass.notes: I-94 and I-29 interchange. Primary ND CDL corridor.

OH.name: Ohio
OH.court_system: Ohio Courts — Supreme Court of Ohio
OH.notes: Municipal Courts and County Courts handle traffic violations. I-70, I-75, I-71, I-77, and I-80/90 (Ohio Turnpike) major CDL corridors.

OK.name: Oklahoma
OK.notes: District Courts and Municipal Courts handle traffic violations. Pay through OSCN. I-40 and I-35 major CDL corridors.

Oklahoma.notes: I-35 and I-40 interchange. Major CDL hub.

OR.name: Oregon
OR.notes: Circuit Courts handle traffic violations. Online payment at courts.oregon.gov/pay. I-5 and I-84 major CDL corridors.

PA.name: Pennsylvania
PA.notes: Magisterial District Courts handle traffic violations. PA Turnpike (I-76), I-78, I-81, I-80 major CDL corridors. Online docket access at ujsportal.pacourts.us.

RI.name: Rhode Island
RI.notes: Traffic Tribunal handles all traffic violations.

Providence.notes: Statewide traffic court. I-95 and I-195 corridor.

SC.name: South Carolina
SC.notes: Magistrate Courts and Municipal Courts handle traffic violations. I-95, I-85, and I-77 major CDL corridors.

Charleston.notes: I-26 and I-526 corridor. Port of Charleston freight hub.

SD.name: South Dakota
SD.notes: Magistrate Courts handle minor violations. Circuit Courts for serious offenses. I-90 and I-29 major CDL corridors.

Minnehaha.address: 425 N Dakota Ave, Sioux Falls, SD 57104
Minnehaha.notes: I-29 and I-90 interchange. Primary SD CDL corridor.

Pennington.address: 315 Saint Joseph St, Rapid City, SD 57701

TN.name: Tennessee
TN.notes: General Sessions Courts handle traffic violations. I-40, I-65, I-24, and I-75 major CDL corridors.

Shelby.court_name: Shelby County General Sessions Court — Traffic
Shelby.notes: I-40 and I-55 corridor. Major trucking hub.

Davidson.court_name: Davidson County General Sessions Court — Traffic

Hamilton.court_name: Hamilton County General Sessions Court — Traffic

Knox.court_name: Knox County General Sessions Court — Traffic

TX.name: Texas
TX.notes: Justice of the Peace Courts handle minor traffic violations. County Courts at Law for more serious violations. Texas CDL holders cannot take defensive driving for CDL-issued tickets. Each county has its own online payment portal. I-10, I-20, I-35, I-45, and I-40 major CDL corridors.

Harris.court_name: Harris County JP Courts / County Court at Law — Traffic
Harris.notes: I-10, I-45, I-69 corridor. Use county website to find specific JP precinct.

Dallas.court_name: Dallas County JP Courts / Criminal District Court

Tarrant.address: 100 W Weatherford St, Fort Worth, TX 76196

El Paso.court_name: El Paso County JP Courts — Traffic
El Paso.address: 500 E San Antonio Ave, El Paso, TX 79901
El Paso.notes: I-10 (New Mexico border) corridor. High CDL volume.

Webb.notes: I-35 Mexico border crossing. Extremely high CDL traffic volume.

Kaufman.notes: I-20 corridor east of Dallas. High CDL volume.

UT.name: Utah
UT.notes: Justice Courts and District Courts handle traffic violations. I-15, I-80, and I-70 major CDL corridors.

Salt Lake.court_name: Salt Lake County Justice Court — Traffic
Salt Lake.address: 450 S State St, Salt Lake City, UT 84111
Salt Lake.notes: I-15 and I-80 interchange. Primary UT CDL hub.

VT.name: Vermont
VT.notes: Judicial Bureau handles minor traffic violations online.

Chittenden.notes: I-89 corridor. Primary VT CDL court.

Windsor.address: 82 Railroad Row, White River Junction, VT 05001

VA.name: Virginia
VA.court_system: Virginia Courts — Supreme Court of Virginia
VA.notes: General District Courts handle traffic violations. Pay online at eapps.courts.state.va.us. I-81, I-95, I-64, and I-85 major CDL corridors.

Fairfax.court_name: Fairfax County General District Court — Traffic

Roanoke.court_name: Roanoke City General District Court — Traffic
Roanoke.address: 315 W Church Ave SW, Roanoke, VA 24011

WA.name: Washington
WA.notes: District Courts and Municipal Courts handle traffic violations. I-5 and I-90 major CDL corridors.

WV.name: West Virginia
WV.notes: Magistrate Courts handle minor traffic violations. Circuit Courts for serious offenses. I-64, I-77, and I-79 corridors.

Kanawha.notes: I-64 and I-77 interchange. Primary WV CDL hub.

WI.name: Wisconsin
WI.notes: Circuit Courts handle traffic violations. Pay online through Wisconsin Court System's eCourts. I-90, I-94, and I-43 major CDL corridors.

Kenosha.notes: I-94 corridor (IL/WI border). High CDL traffic volume.

WY.name: Wyoming
WY.notes: Circuit Courts handle traffic violations. I-80 and I-25 major CDL corridors.

Laramie.notes: I-25 and I-80 interchange. Primary WY CDL court.

Sweetwater.address: 50 W Flaming Gorge Way, Green River, WY 82935
Sweetwater.notes: I-80 corridor (Utah border). High CDL volume.
